name: Slagpup
description: Molten-pawed pup that cools into tough slag.

name: Pyrespore
description: Spore bloom that sheds warm ember pollen.

name: Cinderquill
description: Ash-plumed quillbird of crater rim thermals.

name: Lavaling
description: Soft lava blob that hardens when startled.

name: Furnacebeetle
description: Heat-chambered beetle that vents forge-warm air.

name: Brinepaw
description: Salt-whiskered coastal prowler with wet prints.

name: Kelpwisp
description: Hovering kelp ribbon that tastes of moonfoam.

name: Sprayfin
description: Surf-skimming finner that leaps through spray.

name: Pearlurk
description: Shell-lurking pearl guardian of tide caves.

name: Tidequill
description: Shorebird with ink-dark tide-patterned plumage.

name: Fernfox
description: Fern-tailed fox that vanishes into understory.

name: Saplingo
description: Upright sapling companion with sticky leaf hands.

name: Vinepup
description: Vine-wrapped pup that braids trails as it runs.

name: Thornling
description: Spined seedling that softens for trusted keepers.

name: Mossdrake
description: Low serpentine draped in living moss armor.

name: Galekit
description: Wind-ruffed kit that chases cloud shadows.

name: Cloudleaper
description: Spring-legged peak hopper that rides updrafts.

name: Sparkmoth
description: Tiny moth whose dust crackles like dry lightning.

name: Windrift
description: Ribbon-bodied floater that steers on gusts alone.

name: Thunderpaw
description: Heavy-pawed ridge runner with booming steps.

name: Shalehorn
description: Layered shale horns scrape sparks from canyon walls.

name: Gritling
description: Grit-bodied pebblekin that naps in dust bowls.

name: Basaltpup
description: Columnar basalt pup with cool volcanic plates.

name: Crystowl
description: Crystal-eyed canyon owl that roosts on geodes.

name: Rubblefin
description: Stone-stream swimmer with gravel-scaled fins.

name: Glazehare
description: Ice-glazed hare that leaves glass-thin trails.

name: Rimewing
description: Frost-rimmed wing that sings in thin cold air.

name: Iciclepup
description: Icicle-whiskered pup that chews soft snow.

name: Snowglyph
description: Snow-script spirit that writes fading runes.

name: Frostbloom
description: Ice-petaled bloom that opens only at blue dusk.

name: Dawnkit
description: Sunrise-furred kit that warms cold stone floors.

name: Prismoth
description: Facet-wing moth that scatters soft prism dust.

name: Solfinch
description: Sunbeam finch nesting in citadel lattice light.

name: Gleamhare
description: Gleaming hare that blinks bright when startled.

name: Lightspire
description: Spire of condensed dawnlight with a gentle pulse.

name: Umbralisk
description: Shadow-coil serpent that drinks dim corridor light.

name: Duskling
description: Dusk orb that dims lanterns when nervous.

name: Nullpaw
description: Soft-pawed voidling that erases its own footprints.

name: Echofig
description: Fig-shaped hollow plant that whispers back sounds.

name: Shadowmire
description: Living mire of night that shelters lost pets.

name: Boltgear
description: Bolt-hearted gearling that spins when excited.

name: Scrapowl
description: Copper-feather owl nesting in scrap rafters.

name: Copperfin
description: Cooling-channel swimmer with copper scale plates.

name: Wirefox
description: Wire-tailed fox that rewires shiny refuse into toys.

name: Chronobeetle
description: Clock-shelled beetle that ticks in sync with ruins.

name: Ghostbloom
description: Pale marsh bloom that glows when keepers sing.

name: Dreamhare
description: Soft hare that naps across thin dream borders.

name: Wispdeer
description: Antlered wisp-deer leaving lantern-light prints.

name: Soulmoth
description: Soul-dust moth that follows honest promises.

name: Starveil
description: Veil of starlit silk from the Celestial Rift edge.
